public_data_entrypoints.label: lineup_context
public_data_entrypoints.purpose: 라인업, 보더, 점포/레이트, AI 컨텍스트를 구조화 필드로 분석

public_data_entrypoints.label: sim_result_canonical
public_data_entrypoints.purpose: 시뮬 수치, 가정, seed, 민감도, 하방 리스크를 정본 데이터로 분석

public_data_entrypoints.label: sim_result_text_summary
public_data_entrypoints.purpose: JSON 파싱이 어려운 AI 대화에서 시뮬 결과 요약표를 텍스트로 검토

public_data_entrypoints.label: lineup_ai_rules
public_data_entrypoints.purpose: 공개 라인업 데이터의 사용 목적, 금지선, 필드 설명 확인

public_data_entrypoints.label: simulator_ai_rules
public_data_entrypoints.purpose: 시뮬 결과 해석 규칙과 파일 우선순위 확인

ai_context.purpose: AI input data for Namba low-rate pachinko store and machine comparison.
do_not_use_for: fixed visit ranking in public files
personal trip, booking, passport, lodging, or spending records

field_notes.rate: 1yen uses 200玉 per 200円. 1.111yen uses 180玉 per 200円.
field_notes.border_spins_per_1000yen: Converted reference rotations per 1000円 for simulator and AI comparison.
field_notes.onsite_judgment: Rotation threshold reference only, not a result prediction.
field_notes.aliases: Search/display helpers derived from objective machine names.
field_notes.checked_at: Manual/public-source check date. Re-check onsite if stale.

onsite_observation_template.private_note_location: Keep personal budget/time/movement notes outside public docs.

simulator_context.purpose: Public AI-readable guide for interpreting local pachinko-sim output without publishing personal trip decisions.

ai_analysis_file_priority.reason: 수치 지표, 가정, seed, 스키마 버전, 개인정보 정책, 추가 분석이 typed field로 보존됩니다.

ai_analysis_file_priority.use: JSON 파싱이 어려울 때 쓰는 텍스트 요약
ai_analysis_file_priority.reason: 필드 파싱보다 표 설명과 요약 텍스트가 필요한 AI 대화에서 보조 컨텍스트로 씁니다.

ai_analysis_file_priority.use: 라인업, 점포/레이트, 보더, 시뮬 정책 컨텍스트
ai_analysis_file_priority.reason: 기종명, 레이트, 공개 라인업 필드를 대조할 때 시뮬 결과와 함께 봅니다.

public_safe_to_commit: simulator purpose, assumptions, and metric definitions
fixed public machine specs and store/rate lineup context
latest sanitized aggregate simulator result table in docs/latest-sim-results.*
blank result-sharing template for conversation use
do_not_commit: raw per-sample Monte Carlo sessions or local results.csv files
visit rankings, go-here-today instructions, or final decisions
personal movement, lodging, booking, passport, or spending records
screenshots or app/member-only 台番号별 data
simulator_context.local_result_storage_policy: If CSV save is explicitly selected in the local CLI, results.csv is gitignored and overwritten with the latest run only. Public sharing, when explicitly selected, overwrites docs/latest-sim-results.json, docs/latest-sim-results.md, and docs/latest-sim-results.html with sanitized aggregate metrics only.

standard_public_export.session_policy_note: 현금과 재사용 가능한 보유구슬이 모두 부족할 때까지 진행하되, 9시간 이후에는 진행 중인 우타치/RUSH 상태 종료 시 정리하고 11시간 하드 캡을 둡니다.
standard_public_export.scope: 여행 전 가정 기반의 정제된 집계만 공개합니다. 원시 표본, 실제 플레이 기록, 방문 지시, 개인 지출은 포함하지 않습니다.

time_model.profile_selection: machine family: sea_classic / eva_vst / rezero_fast / battle_fast / generic
time_model.reserve_wait: normal display time beyond active launch time

rate_rules: 1yen uses 200玉 per 200円 and 1000玉 per 1000円.
1.111yen uses 180玉 per 200円 and 900玉 per 1000円.
Compare stores either by identical observed spins per 1000円 or by identical start-gate quality, but do not mix the two.

local_output_metrics.avg_profit: Monte Carlo sample average net result in yen; local estimate only.
local_output_metrics.median_profit: Median net result in yen; often more useful than average for skewed payout distributions.
local_output_metrics.cvar10: Average of the lower 10% tail outcomes.
local_output_metrics.positive_close_rate: Share of sampled sessions ending above zero; not a real-world guarantee.
local_output_metrics.hit_rate: Share of sampled sessions with at least one 大当り(대당첨); not a next-spin prediction.
local_output_metrics.lt_entry_rate: Sampled LT entry share; non-LT machines should be interpreted as not applicable.
local_output_metrics.avg_play_minutes: Estimated stay/play time, including ball firing, reserve waiting, right-side spins, and hit effects.
local_output_metrics.avg_cashless_play_minutes: Estimated time continuing without new cash input through right-side play, hit effects, and reusable held balls.
local_output_metrics.stay_reach_rates: Share of sampled sessions reaching each hour from 1 to 9 hours.
local_output_metrics.time_limit_stop_rate: Share of sampled sessions stopped by the 9-hour after-RUSH cleanup rule.
local_output_metrics.hard_time_limit_stop_rate: Share of sampled sessions stopped by the 11-hour hard safety cap.
local_output_metrics.cash_input_cutoff_rate: Share of sampled sessions that reached the late-session no-new-cash cutoff.
local_output_metrics.final_remaining_value: Unused cash plus exchangeable final balls converted to yen.
local_output_metrics.funds_exhausted_stop_rate: Share of sessions that stopped because cash budget and held balls were both insufficient.
local_output_metrics.avg_post_budget_play_minutes: Average play time after the cash budget was fully spent, sustained by RUSH or won balls.

ai_interpretation_rules: Treat all simulator outputs as local estimates, not predictions.
Use observed spins per 1000円, rate, remaining time, and budget as conversation-time inputs only.
Past 大当り count, current graph shape, and previous misses do not change the next-spin probability.
Prefer explaining risk and assumptions over ranking stores or machines in public files.
Keep final go/stop decisions in chat or private notes, not in GitHub Pages.

conversation_result_template.mode: matrix or budget_matrix or profile or store_comparison
conversation_result_template.publication_note: Do not commit filled results if they include personal budget, schedule, or decisions.
